full_text:
Chang Ju 常俱
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chang Ju (常俱). When Zhongli Mu marched against him, he surrendered alongside Huang Lun. Chang Ju was affiliated with Rebels.
